blockedAssertions.blockedBy: No readable collector or maple dashboard surface was available to prove that a live-emitted span reached the OTEL collector at http://localhost:4318. Read-only probes returned GET / -> 404 and GET /v1/traces -> 405, so ingestion could not be confirmed from the available user-testing tools.

appliedUpdates.description: Documented the foundation terminal-node-api validation surface, isolation guidance, and flow-validator rules for package-level user testing.
Recorded OTEL collector probe behavior (GET / -> 404, GET /v1/traces -> 405) so future validators know collector reachability alone does not prove ingestion.
